name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
description: Validate foundational knowledge of AWS Cloud services, security, pricing, and architecture. Ideal for individuals starting their cloud journey.

name: Meta Front-End Developer Professional Certificate
description: Learn to build modern web interfaces with React, version control with Git, and testing best practices. Designed by Meta engineers.

name: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
description: Comprehensive data science program covering Python, SQL, data visualization, machine learning, and capstone project using real-world data.

name: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
description: Learn the tools and techniques used by entry-level data analysts. Covers spreadsheets, SQL, R programming, Tableau, and data-driven decision making.

name: TensorFlow Developer Certificate
description: Demonstrate proficiency in building and training neural networks using TensorFlow. Covers CNNs, RNNs, NLP, and time series forecasting.

name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
description: Validate foundational knowledge of Azure cloud services, core solutions, management tools, governance, privacy, and compliance.

name: CompTIA Security+
description: Globally recognized certification covering core cybersecurity skills including threat detection, risk management, cryptography, and incident response.

name: Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
description: Validate your ability to install, configure, and troubleshoot networks. Covers network fundamentals, IP services, security fundamentals, and automation.

name: HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate
description: Demonstrate skills in infrastructure as code using Terraform. Covers configuration syntax, state management, modules, and cloud provider integration.
